title: A Strange Sea Near Jaya
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on cricket and the dream of the sky. The Straw Hats meet people connected to Mont Blanc Noland’s legend and begin chasing the impossible route to the sky.
scene: This scene belongs to the Cricket and the Dream of the Sky sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Sanji, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That don't mean we needta act nervous!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Watch out for the enemy below!

summary: The Straw Hats meet people connected to Mont Blanc Noland’s legend and begin chasing the impossible route to the sky.
